scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Viewer
scopes.description: Someone can see data using scope

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Admin
scopes.description: Someone can manage data using scope

role-templates.name: Viewer
role-templates.description: View all data from our catalog service
role-templates.default-role-name: Viewer: Authorized to Read All data

role-templates.name: Admin
role-templates.description: Edit, delete all data from service
